predictions.forecast_value: unlikely to rise much further from ~2.5%
predictions.source_quote: Investors may not need to be concerned about bond yields rising much further. If their capital is safe and they are collecting a 2.5% yield in the meantime, then the case for bonds is much stronger.
Recession now looks like a base case for the region within the next year as rising fuel, food and energy bills weigh on household incomes.
